findings.issue: No path isolation on uploaded file name
findings.evidence_span: upload.py: accept() trusts file.name.endswith('.png') and stores uploads_dir / file.name
findings.recommended_fix: Use a sanitized unique filename and restrict upload directory to prevent path traversal.

findings.issue: File type validated only by extension
findings.recommended_fix: Validate file content using magic bytes instead of relying solely on extension.
Configure audit retention period (e.g., audit.retention_days = 90) to comply with data retention policies.
